house_checks.name: sigil_no_reuse
house_checks.symptom: The ids I get back look wrong and a deleted id gets handed out again — I expect stable, never-reused, zero-padded sigils.

house_checks.name: dual_addressing
house_checks.symptom: Removing an item by its number and then looking one up by id give me the wrong record — the id I show by and the number I remove by don't behave the same way.

house_checks.name: fenced_persistence
house_checks.symptom: A record whose text has commas, quotes or tabs comes back mangled, and the stored form isn't the fenced layout I expect.

house_checks.name: provenance_suffix
house_checks.symptom: My listing doesn't mark which records were freshly added versus ever-edited — I expect a provenance flag on each line.

house_checks.name: not_found_protocol
house_checks.symptom: Looking up an id that doesn't exist gives me a generic error and the wrong exit status — I need a precise absent signal.

house_checks.name: canonical_tags
house_checks.symptom: My tags show up in the wrong case, duplicated, out of order, and joined with the wrong character.

house_checks.name: search_scoping
house_checks.symptom: Plain search reaches into places it shouldn't — I expect it to match titles only unless I ask it to go deep.

house_checks.name: ledger_journaling
house_checks.symptom: There's no audit trail — after I add and then edit a record I can't replay the sequence of what happened to it.
